problem_summary: High school math problem requiring calculation of instantaneous velocity from a displacement function, with potential OCR errors in the function's exponents and coefficients
givens: Displacement function S(t) = 2t² - 5t² (likely OCR error; expected S(t) = 2t³ - 5t²)
Multiple-choice options: A.9 m/s, B.24 m/s, C.48 m/s, D.54 m/s
candidate_methods: Differentiate displacement function S(t) to obtain velocity function v(t)

exact_check_targets.answer_format: Single letter choice (A, B, C, D)

risks: OCR misread exponents (e.g., t² instead of t³ in S(t))
Misinterpretation of displacement function form due to poor image quality
Potential confusion between similar-looking symbols (e.g., 3 vs 2 in exponents)
